_comment: Canonical crisis-sign phrase lists (docs/06 §5). Single source of truth; the runtime mirror is DefaultCrisisSignalLexicon (shared/domain), pinned by CrisisSignalLexiconParityTest. CONSERVATIVE, EXPLICIT phrases only — this drives a warm hand-off offer, never a diagnosis or label. Authoritative lists are advisor-supplied (docs/12 §3); this is the reviewed starter (en/de/ur).

en: do not want to be alive
